banners.permissionDetail: Allow access in system settings — sync will resume automatically.
banners.networkPaused: Transfer paused — waiting for the network to recover.
banners.notConnected: Not connected to "{{device}}" — make sure Vivi Drop is running on your computer.
banners.progressWindowsRetry: Progress saved ({{transferred}} / {{total}}). Retry {{attempt}} in {{seconds}}s. Check firewall, security software, or VPN on this Windows PC.
banners.progressWindowsNoRetry: Progress saved ({{transferred}} / {{total}}). Check firewall, security software, or VPN on this Windows PC — sync will resume automatically.
banners.networkWithRetry: Progress saved ({{transferred}} / {{total}}). Retry {{attempt}} in {{seconds}}s after the network recovers.
banners.networkAutoResume: Progress saved ({{transferred}} / {{total}}). Sync will resume when the network recovers.
banners.connectionErrorResume: Sync will resume when the network is restored or Vivi Drop is reopened on your computer.
banners.connectingAutoResume: Sync will resume automatically once connected.
